automationEvents.rationale: This reply discusses model progress and production usage, not any limit or rate-limit reset.
automationEvents.tweetText:
Thinking back, quite crazy to think about the progress that was made since December last year when GPT-5.2 was released.

It now is seeing <1% of usage in production and is considered quite outdated!

automationEvents.rationale: This post is about model availability changes, not user caps or rate limits resetting.
automationEvents.tweetText:
To simplify our Codex compute fleet management, we will be sunsetting GPT-5.2 and GPT-5.3-Codex in Codex on June 2nd when logged in with your ChatGPT account.

For free plans, GPT-5.5 will be the default frontier model to build and work with going forward.

These models will remain available on our API.
